query:
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, startTimeEst, bracketRound, bracketRegion,
       awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread, bookTotal, awayML, homeML,
       openAwaySpread, openHomeSpread, openTotal, openAwayML, openHomeML,
       publishedModel
FROM games 
WHERE sport = 'NCAAM' AND gameDate = '2026-03-22'
  AND awayTeam IN ('miami_fl','kentucky','st_johns','tennessee','iowa','utah_st','ucla','texas_tech',
                   'purdue','iowa_st','kansas','virginia','florida','arizona','connecticut','alabama')
ORDER BY startTimeEst ASC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute 
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, startTimeEst, bracketRound, bracketRegion,
       awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread, bookTotal, awayML, homeML,
       openAwaySpread, openHomeSpread, openTotal, openAwayML, openHomeML,
       publishedModel
FROM games 
WHERE sport = 'NCAAM' AND gameDate = '2026-03-22'
  AND awayTeam IN ('miami_fl','kentucky','st_johns','tennessee','iowa','utah_st','ucla','texas_tech',
                   'purdue','iowa_st','kansas','virginia','florida','arizona','connecticut','alabama')
ORDER BY startTimeEst ASC;
